product.name: Roby's Coffee House digital visit funnel
product.userGoal: Discover a suitable drink or pairing, understand the price, find the cafe, and visit without pressure.
product.businessGoal: Increase qualified cafe visits, pairing selection, reservations, and repeat visits without hiding price, choice, or exit.

journey.label: Homepage, shared menu, QR, search, or Instagram entry
Searchable multilingual menu with explicit TRY prices
Google Maps directions or Instagram reservation handoff
Return visit or voluntary community relationship

observations.label: VALUE_PATH_CLEAR
observations.claim: The repository exposes a coherent digital path from entry to menu, pairing discovery, directions, and Instagram reservation.

observations.label: VALUE_PATH_CLEAR
observations.claim: Pairings are optional and separately priced; the site contains no online checkout or one-click payment commitment.

observations.label: MEASUREMENT_GAP
observations.claim: Analytics are buffered in the page and dataLayer, but the repository does not prove durable collection or attribution to POS purchase, AOV, LTV, refund, churn, or repeat visit.

observations.label: RECOVERY_GAP
observations.claim: Taste Journey remembers language, visit stage, and discovered pairings locally, but it does not preserve a selected pairing through Maps or Instagram handoff.

observations.label: FRICTION_RISK
observations.claim: External Maps and Instagram transitions lose product context, so staff and the visitor must reconstruct the intended pairing or reservation manually.

observations.label: VALUE_UNPROVEN
observations.claim: Approved-offer and social-offer presentation exists, but no exact experiment, cohort, denominator, observation window, counter-metrics, or realized-value result is stored in this repository.

experiments.name: Pairing-to-handoff continuity
experiments.hypothesis: Showing the chosen pairing before Maps or Instagram handoff reduces reconstruction friction.

experiments.name: Aggregate visit attribution bridge
experiments.hypothesis: A bounded source or offer code can connect digital intent to aggregate POS outcomes without personal profiling.

experiments.name: Voluntary resume-last-pairing
experiments.hypothesis: A visible local resume option helps returning visitors without creating pressure.

authority: The lens and its labels are advisory. They do not authorize pricing, payment, launch, experiment, deployment, delivery, or merge.
